noteflightScore.title: A 'modern' Habanera Composition
noteflightScore.subtitle: My Composition is based on Georges Bizet's Habanera

expression.text: Disclaimer: screams are not realistically possible (disproved by Seb)

annotation.text: The next 3 bars use the chord of G major - the notes of G,B,D
The next 4 bars use the chord of D major - the notes D,F#,A
This bar uses the chord of A major - notes A, C#, E
